markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content progress and align on strategy for more meaningful articles.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** The team will now produce a mix of "Accounting 101" articles (for LLM/SEO) and deep-dive "Practice Guides" (e.g., "Deferred Revenue") to build credibility and provide shareable, expert-level content.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [**Sprint Manager Transition:** William will transition to a new engagement manager after the sprint. The new manager will own the 12-month contract, enabling long-term strategic continuity.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [**Process Refinements:** To improve feedback loops, article names in Slack will be standardized, and GrowthX editors will proactively track recurring client feedback themes.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [**Indexing Issue:** New articles require manual indexing in Google Search Console. This is a common issue for new sites and not a major red flag, but requires ongoing monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy: From "Buzzfeed-y" to Meaningful

  - [**Goal:** Produce more meaningful content that provides genuine value and builds credibility, moving beyond generic listicles.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [**"Buzzfeed-y" Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Critical for LLM training and broad SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [**Example:** "7 Best Quote-to-Billing Tools."](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [**Meaningful Content ("Practice Guides"):**](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Builds credibility, provides shareable resources, and supports sales/marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
      - [**Examples:** "Deferred Revenue," "Revenue Leakage."](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [**Execution:** Achieve this by incorporating proprietary knowledge.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [**Method 1 (Manual):** Turnstile provides outlines with unique perspectives.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
      - [**Method 2 (Scalable):** GrowthX's AI pipeline ingests Turnstile's internal knowledge sources (e.g., founder social media, internal docs) to automatically infuse expert insights.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)

### Process & Feedback Loop

  - [**Feedback Tracking:** To prevent repeated feedback, GrowthX editors will now track recurring themes (e.g., "we are not a billing solution").](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
      - [**Action:** William will demo the "Atlas" platform to Turnstile to improve feedback efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [**Slack Communication:** To reduce confusion from high volume, article names in Slack will be standardized to their full titles.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [**Self-Promotion:** Reduce "shoehorned" product mentions to protect credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
      - [**Solution:** Use strong, relevant CTAs at the end of articles to drive conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)

### Sprint Progress & Metrics

  - [**Pipeline:** 8 articles are in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
      - [**Ready to Publish:** 3 articles (awaiting Matt).](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
      - [**Final Revisions:** 5 articles (due EOD).](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
      - [**In Progress:** 5 articles (2 due EOD, 3 due tomorrow).](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [**Traffic:** Early data shows positive momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [**Total Sessions:** \~500.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [**Blog Sessions:** \~130.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [**Top Article:** "8 Best Recurring Billing Softwares" (\~20% of blog traffic).](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [**Keyword Strategy:** The initial strategy covers hundreds of articles. It will be reviewed quarterly by the new engagement manager to ensure alignment with Turnstile's evolving goals.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)

### AI Analytics Tool

  - [**Purpose:** Track Turnstile's visibility and ranking in LLM responses against competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [**Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
      - [**Position:** Turnstile's rank in LLM-generated lists of solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
      - [**Share of Voice:** Percentage of LLM prompts where Turnstile is mentioned.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [**Action:** William will draft an initial list of high-conversion prompts for Turnstile to review and refine.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
      - [Demo the "Atlas" platform to Turnstile.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
      - [Draft initial high-conversion prompts for the AI analytics tool.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
      - [Ensure a smooth transition to the new engagement manager.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [**Turnstile:**](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
      - [Request Matt publish the 3 ready-to-go articles by EOD.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
      - [Review and refine the draft AI prompts from William.](https://fathom.video/share/PrHhHakR-6AvBt9ppujhanbqScKzsspr?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
